ORDER CONTINUED FOR PROOF SERVICE TO SEPTEMBER 27, 2018 AT 8:30AM. THE PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON MAY 10,2018 IS DEFECTIVE. PLAINTIFF EFFECTED SUBSTITUTED SERVICE AT AN ADDRESS NOT CONNECTED TO DEFENDANT ON PLAINTIFF'S BUSINESS RECORDS; NO EVIDENCE THAT SUCH ADDRESS WAS PROPER FOR SERVICE.
